name: Cursor Thief
description: A tiny creature scuttles in, steals your selected text, runs off with it, and brings it back.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com
